title: ophrys heldreichii subsp. pharia
intro: Ophrys heldreichii subsp. pharia, also known as Phare's Bee Orchid, is a rare and endangered subspecies of flowering plant in the orchid family, native to the mountains of Greece and Albania. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Ophrys heldreichii subsp. pharia include its ability to relieve congestion, reduce fever, and soothe irritated throats, making it a valuable natural remedy for respiratory health. In herbal preparations, Ophrys heldreichii subsp. pharia is often dried and used in teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from respiratory issues.
